prayers.text:
Praised be Thy Name, O my God! Thou dost testify that Thy will doth prevail over all created things, and Thy mercy hath surpassed all in the heavens and on the earth. And when, according to Thy decree, Thy sovereignty was to be revealed, Thy Word glorified, and Thy loving-kindness and mercy manifested, Thou didst cause one of Thy servants to arise; Thou didst choose him before all creatures, separate him for Thy purpose, invest him with the raiment of Thy guidance, immerse him in the seas of Thy majesty and glory, sanctify him from all that is not in keeping with the greatness of Thy glory and the power of Thy might, and command him to cry out unto all in the heavens and on earth, and to summon all mankind before the Manifestation of Thyself and the Revealer of Thy signs.

But no sooner had he proclaimed Thy Cause and arisen to accomplish all that was commanded him in the Tablets of Thy decree, than the Great Terror seized Thy creatures. Some turned their faces unto Thee and were detached from all else; they sanctified their souls from the world and all that is therein, so enamoured of Thy sweet voice that they renounced all that Thou hast created in the realm of Thy creation. Others recognized Thee and then hesitated; others suffered the world to intervene between them and Thee and to prevent them from acknowledging Thee. And there were those who disdained Thee, turned their backs unto Thee, and sought to prevent Thee from accomplishing Thy purpose. Yet behold: all of them call upon Thee in anticipation of that which hath been promised them in Thy Tablets. And when the Promised One appeared among them, they recognized Him not. They doubted Thy signs, rejected Thy clear proofs, and strayed so grievously from Thy path that they slew Thy servants, whose radiant faces had illumined the countenances of the highest hosts.

I implore Thee, O Thou Lord of all Names, protect Thy loved ones from Thy enemies.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: I implore Thee, O my Lord, by that Most Exalted Word which hath struck with terror the hearts of all who are in the heavens and on the earth, except only those who have firmly held to Thy Sure Guidance, suffer me not to be forsaken among Thy creatures. Lift me up unto Thyself, cause me to enter the shelter of Thy mercy, and give me to drink of the pure wine of Thy providence, that I may dwell within the tabernacle of Thy majesty and under the pallium of Thy favour. Powerful art Thou to do as Thou pleasest. Thou, verily, art the Help in the midst of need, the Self-Subsistent.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
The search results provide the translation directly. I will now format it according to the user's request.
Glory be to Thee, O my God! Thou art God, Who was before all things, Who will be after all things, and Who will remain when all things shall have vanished. Thou art God, Who knoweth all things, and art beyond all existence. Thou art God, Who is merciful unto all, Who will judge all, and Whose glance encompasseth all existence. Thou art my Lord God, Thou knowest my state, Thou perceivest my outward and inward essence.
	Bestow Thy forgiveness upon me and upon the believers who responded to Thy Call. Be my sure protector against the stratagems of those who would cause me suffering or wish me ill. Verily, Thou art the Lord of all existence. Thou bestowest upon all, and without Thee, none can exist.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
In the Name of God, the Most Ancient, the Most Great!

Indeed the hearts of the sincere are consumed in the fire of separation: Where is the gleaming of the light of Thy Countenance, O Beloved of the worlds?

Those who are near unto Thee have been abandoned in the darkness of desolation: Where is the shining of the morn of Thy reunion, O Desire of the worlds?

The bodies of Thy chosen ones lie quivering on distant sands: Where is the ocean of Thy presence, O Enchanter of the worlds?

Longing hands are uplifted to the heaven of Thy grace and generosity: Where are the rains of Thy bestowal, O Answerer of the worlds?

The infidels have risen in tyranny on every hand: Where is the compelling power of Thy pen of glory, O Conqueror of the worlds?

The barking of dogs is loud on every side: Where is the lion of the forest of Thy might, O Chastiser of the worlds?

Coldness hath gripped all mankind: Where is the heat of Thy love, O Flame of the worlds?

Calamity hath reached its height: Where are the signs of Thy succor, O Deliverer of the worlds?

Darkness hath enveloped most of the peoples: Where is the brightness of Thy splendor, O Radiance of the worlds?

The necks of men are stretched out in malice: Where are the swords of Thy vengeance, O Destroyer of the worlds?

Abasement hath reached its lowest depth: Where are the emblems of Thy glory, O Glory of the worlds?

Sorrows have afflicted the Revealer of Thy Name, the All-Merciful: Where is the joy of the Dayspring of Thy Revelation, O Delight of the worlds?

Anguish hath befalled all the peoples of the earth: Where are the banners of Thy gladness, O Joy of the worlds?

Thou seest the Dayspring of Thy signs veiled by evil suggestions: Where are the fingers of Thy might, O Power of the worlds?

Sore thirst hath overcome all men: Where is the river of Thy bounty, O Mercy of the worlds?

Thou seest Me alone and banished in this remote land: Where are the hosts of the heaven of Thy Command, O Sovereign of the worlds?

I am left forsaken in a strange land: Where are the tokens of Thy faithfulness, O Trust of the worlds?

The agonies of death have laid hold on all men: Where is the surging of the ocean of Thine eternal life, O Life of the worlds?

The whisperings of Satan have been breathed into every ear: [Where is the meteor of Thy fire, O Light of the worlds?]
prayers.name: The Fire Tablet (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
The Google Search results provided a direct translation of the provided Kannada text into English.

Here is the translated prayer:

(In the month of Ala [Loftiness], the fast is observed from March 2nd to 20th. During these days, from sunrise to sunset, no food or drink of any kind should be consumed. This is a time for prayer and spiritual rejuvenation. Those under 15 years of age, travelers, the sick, pregnant, and breastfeeding mothers are exempt from the fast.)

O Lord my God, Thou art Praiseworthy! I beseech Thee by this Thy Manifestation, through which darkness hath been turned into light, the Temple hath been built, the Law hath been revealed, and the Tablets have been unrolled, to cause me and them to ascend unto the heaven of Thy inconceivable and glorious majesty, and to wash away the stain of doubts from those who hinder the skeptical from entering the court of Thy sanctuary.

O Lord, I am one who hath clung fast to the cord of Thy love, and who is eagerly waiting for Thy mercy and favor. Grant unto me and to all my loved ones all the good of this world and the world to come. Bestow upon them the hidden gift which Thou hast reserved for Thy chosen ones.

O Lord, these are the days in which Thou hast ordained that Thy servants should observe the fast. Blessed is he who observeth the fast for Thy sake and with absolute detachment from all things save Thee. O God, help me and them to obey Thy command and to follow Thy teachings. Verily, Thou art powerful to do what Thou desirest. There is no God but Thee, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. All praise be to God, the Lord of all worlds.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเมื่อประสบความยากลำบาก

zh-Hans.cat: 为殉道者及其亲属祈祷

prayers.text:
Lauded be Thy name, O Thou in Whose hands is the kingdom of all names, and in the grasp of Whose might are all that are in heaven and all that are on earth! I entreat Thee, by Him Who is Thy Most Effulgent Name Whom Thou hast made a target for the darts of Thy decree in Thy path, O Thou the King of eternity, to rend asunder the veils that have shut off Thy creatures from the horizon of Thy glory, that haply they may turn their faces in the direction of Thy mercy, and draw nigh unto the Day-Spring of Thy loving-kindness.

Leave not Thy servants to themselves, O my Lord! Draw them through the influence of Thine utterances unto the Dawning-Place of Thine inspiration, and to the Fountain of Thy Revelation, and to the Treasury of Thy wisdom. Thou art He to Whose strength and power all things have testified, Whose Purpose nothing whatsoever of all that hath been created in Thy heaven and on Thy earth hath been able to frustrate.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: Praise be to Thee, O my God! Thou hast guided me to the horizon of Thy Manifestation and made me known through Thy Name! I beg of Thee, by the radiant light of Thy gifts and by the waves of Thy beneficence, to endow my utterance with inspiration from the traces of Thy Supreme Pen that it may attract the realities of all things. Verily, Thou art the One Who is powerful in all that He wills by His Word, the mighty, the wonderful!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเพื่อชัยชนะของศาสนา

prayers.text:
O God. Glory be to Thee. Thou art God, Who hast existed before all existence, and wilt exist after all existence, and art everlasting, transcending all things. Thou art He Who knoweth all things, Who possesseth the dominion of all things, Who judgeth amongst all things, and Who perceiveth all things. Thou art God, my Lord. And Thou knowest my station, and witnessest my inner and outer being.
　Forgive me and them that have answered Thy call. Be Thou a sufficient helper against the harm of those who would bring me sorrow or wish me unhappiness. Verily, Thou art the Lord of all creation. Thou art He Who sufficeth all, and none can suffice themselves without Thee.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Praise be to Thee, O my Lord, my God! This servant hath drunk of the wine of Thy compassion from the hand of Thy grace, and hath tasted the fragrance of Thy love in Thy Day. I supplicate Thee by the Manifestations of Thy Names to bestow upon this servant that which is good, and to uplift this servant to such heights that he may regard this world as a shadow that vanisheth more swiftly than the twinkling of an eye. For these Manifestations are not hindered from rejoicing in Thy love by any sorrow, nor are they debarred from beholding Thy Face. Neither are they turned aside from the path of Thy good pleasure by the hosts of the heedless.

O God, by the power of Thine immeasurable glory, protect this servant from all that Thou abhorrest. Verily Thou art the Lord of this servant, and the Lord of all worlds.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: Thou beholdest, O my Lord, my supplicating hands stretched out toward the heaven of Thy bounty and grace. Grant that they may be filled with the treasures of Thy munificence and generous favor. Forgive me, and my fathers and my mothers, and fulfill whatsoever I have desired from the ocean of Thy grace and Divine generosity. Accept, O Beloved of my heart, all my deeds in Thy path. Verily, Thou art the All-Powerful, the Most Exalted, the Incomparable, the One, the Forgiving, the Gracious.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: My Lord, my Master! My desire, my most beloved! O Thou beloved of all that is in the heavens and the earth! From the ocean of Thy bounty and the celestial mercy of Thy Day Star, I pray Thee to grant permission that I may be cursed, reviled, and insulted many times for the sake of Thy love, and my ears be blessed by hearing the sweet words, "Verily, ye are the people of Bahá".
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
You are God, and there is no God other than You.

    O my God! Pure and Holy are You, O my God! Verily, You are the Most Capable in this world. You are the Almighty of all beings, and the creation, the whole of it, is in Your power. You create whatsoever You will. There is no wise and exalted God other than You.

    O my God! Pure and Holy are You, O my God! Following those who stand in Your presence, following those who attain Your countenance, I ask of You: Look upon us with a forgiving eye, cast upon us Your special attention. Ignite us with the fire of Your love and let us drink from the water of Your grace. Then give us strength to be steadfast in the path of love and affection, and grant us a dwelling-place in Your holy presence, for You are the Generous, the Forgiving, the Knowing, and the Wise.
prayers.name: Seeking Help (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Gather ye in unclouded joy, and at the commencement of every meeting recite the following prayer:
    
O Thou, King of the Kingdom! Though our bodies are gathered here, our enchanted hearts are carried away by Thy love and uplifted by the rays of Thine effulgent countenance. Though we are weak, we await the manifestation of Thy power and might. Though we are poor, possessing no goods nor means, we draw upon the riches from the treasuries of Thy Kingdom. Though we are drops, we draw from the depths of Thy ocean. Though we are dust, we glimmer in the glory of Thy magnificent Sun.
    
O Thou, our Benefactor! Send down upon us Thy succour, that each one present may become a burning candle, each one a center of attraction, each one a herald of Thy heavenly spheres, until we make this earthly world a mirror of Thy Paradise.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: My God, my God! These are Thy servants, sincere and drawn unto Thee, set ablaze with the fire of Thy love, calling out in Thy name and uttering Thy praise. They are enkindled with the flame that hath been kindled in the Lote-tree of Thy mercy, and are drinking from the clouds of Thy oneness, and are supplicating in the kingdom of Thy singleness, and desire naught but Thy pleasure, and are content with Thy decree. O Lord, help them with the hosts of the Most High, and aid them with Thy sovereign power, and make their faces to shine with the light of guidance, that they may be the signs of Thy mercy amongst Thy servants, and bestow upon them Thy boundless gifts, and lift the veils from their faces, and single them out with Thy unfathomable favours. Verily, Thou art the Generous, verily, Thou art the Most Great, and verily, Thou art the Compassionate, the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God, O my God! Praised be Thou for having strengthened me to recognize Thy unity, drawn me to the words of Thy unity, kindled me with the fire of Thy love and occupied me with the remembrance of Thee and the service of Thy friends and handmaidens.

O Lord, help me to be patient and humble and strengthen me in separating myself from all things and in clinging to the hem of the garment of Thy glory, so that my heart may be filled with Thy love and leave no room for love of the world and attraction to its vanities.

O God! Consecrate me from all except Thee, cleanse me from sins and transgressions and provide for me that I may possess a spiritual heart and conscience.

Verily, Thou art merciful and verily, Thou art the Most Bountiful, Whose aid all men seek.
prayers.name: Spiritual Qualities (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานขอความคุ้มครอง

prayers.text:
O my God, O my God, glory be to Thee! Thou hast confirmed my faith in Thy unity, Thou hast drawn me to the affirmation of Thy oneness, Thou hast set me ablaze with the fire of Thy love, Thou hast incited me to mention Thee, to serve Thy servants and handmaidens.
O Lord, help me to show forth modesty and humility, strengthen my will to detach myself from all things and to cling to the hem of Thy garment of glory, so that my heart may be filled with Thy love, leaving no room for the allure of the world and attachment to its attributes.
O God, purify me from all that is not Thee, wash me clean from the impurities of sin and transgression, grant me a pure conscience and a pure heart.
Thou art indeed Merciful, and Thou art indeed the Most Bountiful, He Whom all men seek for succour.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

ja.cat: ティーチング（一般の祈り）

prayers.text: I bitte Dich, o mein Gott, bei Deiner Kraft und Deiner Herrschaft, die alle in Deinem Himmel und auf Deiner Erde umfasst, zeige Deinen Dienern diesen leuchtenden Weg und diesen geraden Pfad, damit sie Deine Einheit und Einzigkeit mit einer Gewissheit erkennen, die weder der eitle Wahn der Zweifler schmälern noch der leere Trug der Widerspenstigen verdunkeln kann. Erleuchte, o mein Herr, die Augen Deiner Diener und erheitere ihr Herz mit dem Lichtglanz Deiner Erkenntnis, damit sie die Größe dieser erhabensten Stufe erfassen und diesen strahlenden Horizont erkennen, so dass die Menschen mit ihrem Geschrei sie nicht mehr davon abhalten, ihren Blick auf das strahlende Licht Deiner Einheit zu richten, noch sie hindern, ihr Angesicht dem Horizonte der Loslösung zuzuwenden.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O God! Refresh and gladden my spirit. Purify my heart. Illumine my powers. I lay all my affairs in Thy hand. Thou art my Guide and my Refuge. I will no longer be sorrowful and grieved; I will be a happy and joyful being. O God! I will no longer be full of anxiety, nor will I let trouble harass me. I will not dwell on the unpleasant things of life. O God! Thou art more friend to me than I am to myself. I dedicate myself to Thee, O Lord.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเพื่อพัฒนาจิตใจ

prayers.text:
Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee to let rain down from the clouds of Thy overflowing grace that which shall cleanse the hearts of Thy servants from everything that may prevent them from beholding Thy face, or from turning unto Thee, that they may all recognize Him Who is their Fashioner and their Creator. Help them, then, O God, through the aid of Thy supreme power, to attain such a station that they may easily distinguish the foul odor from the fragrance of the garment of the Bearer of Thy most exalted Name, that they may turn with all their affections towards Thee, and enjoy such intimate communion with Thee that if all that is in heaven and on earth were given them, they would regard it as of no account, and would refuse to abandon Thy remembrance and the praise of Thy virtues.

I implore Thee, O my Beloved, the Desire of my heart, to protect Thy servant who seeketh Thy face from the arrows of them that have denied Thee, and from the spears of such as have rejected Thy truth. Cause him, then, to be wholly devoted to Thee, to proclaim Thy name, and to fix his gaze upon the sanctuary of Thy revelation. Thou art, verily, He Who hath never turned back from the door of Thy mercy them that have set their hopes in Thee, nor barred from the court of Thy grace such as have sought Thee. No God is there but Thee, the Most Powerful, the All-Highest, the Help in Peril, the All-Glorious, the All-Compelling, the Unconditioned.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: Say: O God, my God! Adorn my head with the crown of justice, and my temple with the ornament of equity. Thou, verily, art the Possessor of all gifts and bounties.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God, O my God! This servant of Thine has advanced towards Thee, wanders passionately through the desert of Thy love, walks the path of Thy service, awaits Thy favors, longs for Thy munificence, trusts in Thy kingdom, and is intoxicated with the wine of Thy bounty. O my God! Increase the fervor of his devotion to Thee, the constancy of his praise of Thee, and the ardor of his love for Thee.

Verily, Thou art the Most Generous, the Lord of abundant grace. There is no other God but Thee, the Forgiver, the Merciful.
prayers.name: Spiritual Qualities (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Praise be to Thee, O Lord my God! These are the days whereon Thou hast bidden all them that Thou hast chosen, and them that Thou lovest, and all Thy servants, to observe the Fast, which Thou hast made to be a light unto the people of Thy kingdom, even as Thou hast made the obligatory prayer to be a ladder of ascent for them that recognize Thy unity. These two Thou hast ordained to be the two pillars whereon Thou hast based the glory and honor of all the people of the world.

I beseech Thee, by these two pillars, to preserve Thy religion from the mischief of them that follow their own corrupt desires, and from the malice of every wicked doer. O Lord, hide not the light which Thou hast revealed through Thy strength and Thy power that encompasseth all things. And with the hosts of the seen and the unseen, do Thou help them that have truly believed in Thee, through Thy command and Thy power that overruleth all that is in heaven and on earth. No God is there but Thee, the All-Powerful, the Most Mighty.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: Say: O God, my God! Adorn my head with the crown of justice and place upon my brow the jewel of truth. Thou art indeed the Possessor of all gifts and bounties.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O God, my God! This is Thy servant of glory, Thy spiritual servant. He draweth nigh unto Thee, approach¬eth Thy presence. He looketh toward Thee, confirmeth Thy oneness, confesseth Thy unity; he proclaimeth Thy holy Name in all lands, and guideth men to the gentle streams of Thy grace.

O Lord, Thou art Most Merciful! Thou dost let the caller drink from the cup of guidance, in which grace is boundless and sweetness overflows.

O Lord, in all circumstances, do Thou aid him. Let him apprehend the mysteries of Thy cherished protection, and pour upon him Thy hidden pearls; let him be as a banner on the towers of strength, waving in the breeze of Thy heavenly aid; let him be as a spring of crystal waters.

O Thou, my generous Lord! By the light of Thy lamp which shineth upon all nations, reveal unto Thy favoured ones, the realities of all things.

Verily, Thou art the Mighty, the Powerful, the Protector, the Strong, the Kind! Verily, Thou art the Lord of infinite mercy!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

mi.cat: ḤUQÚQU’LLÁH: KO TĒTAHI MŌTIKA NĀ TE ATU

prayers.text:
These are Thy servants who have been drawn by the call of Thy summons, have uttered Thy praise, have been attracted by the breezes of Thy holiness in Thy days, have been inflamed by the fire burning from Thy sacred tree, have been awakened by Thy breaths, and have been stirred by Thy sweet savors, by beholding Thy signs, comprehending Thy verses, hearing Thy words, believing in Thy Revelation, and being assured of Thy favor. Their eyes, O Divine One, are fixed on the kingdom of Thy brilliant glory, and their faces turned towards Thy exalted dominion; their hearts beat with the love of Thy luminous and shining countenance, their souls are inflamed with the fire of Thy love; O Thou, the Lord of this world and the next, their lives overflow with eagerness to attain unto Thee, and their tears flow like a torrent for Thy sake.

Guard them, O my God, within the stronghold of Thy protection and shelter, and keep them under the eye of Thy care; look upon them with the eye of Thy grace and tender mercy, and make them signs of Thy divine unity manifest in all lands, banners floating over the palaces of majesty, lamps burning with the oil of wisdom in the lanterns of guidance, singing birds in the garden of Thy knowledge upon the highest boughs of the paradise of protection, and fishes in the ocean of generosity diving into its infinite depths by Thy great mercy.

O Lord! my God! Thy servants are obedient, make them soar in Thy heavenly kingdom; they are weak, strengthen them with Thy sovereign might. They are abased, bestow on them Thy glory in Thy exalted dominion. They are poor, enrich them in Thy magnificent sovereignty. Then destine for them all the good Thou hast ordained in Thy visible and invisible worlds, make them prosperous in this world, gladden their hearts with Thy spirit, O Thou, the Lord of all beings! Enlighten their hearts with the glad tidings that stream from Thy glorious station, establish their steps in Thy Great Covenant, and confirm their loins in Thy Testament, O Thou, the Merciful, the Compassionate! Thou art, indeed, the Bountiful, the Most Generous.
prayers.name: God is Allah! O Allah, my God! (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Maha Mulialah Engkau, ya Tuhanku! Aku bersyukur kepada-Mu karena Engkau telah memung- kinkan daku mengenal Dia, Fajar rahmat-Mu dan Tempat Terbit kurnia-Mu dan Sumber Agama-Mu. Aku memohon kepada-Mu demi Nama-Mu, yang karena-nya wajah-wajah mereka yang dekat pada-Mu telah menjadi putih, dan kalbu-kalbu mereka yang men-cintai-Mu telah terbang kepada-Mu, agar hendaknya mengizinkan daku berpegang teguh pada tali-Mu pada setiap waktu dan dalam segala keadaan, terlepas dari ikatan siapa pun kecuali Engkau, dan agar mataku tetap mengarah pada ufuk Wahyu-Mu dan dapat menjalankan apa yang telah Engkau tentukan bagiku dalam Firman-Mu.
Ya Tuhanku, hiasilah jiwa dan ragaku dengan jubah rahmat-Mu dan kasih sayang-Mu. Kemudian selamat- kanlah daku dari segala sesuatu yang tak Engkau ridhoi, dan dengan penuh rahmat, tolonglah daku dan keluargaku agar mentaati-Mu dan menjauhi dari apa yang dapat menimbulkan hawa nafsu dan segala keinginan jahat dalam diriku.
Sesungguhnya, Engkaulah Tuhan seluruh umat manusia, dan Pemilik dunia dan akhirat. Tiada Tuhan selain Engkau, Yang Maha Tahu, Yang Maha Arif.Glorified art Thou, O my Lord! I give thanks unto Thee that Thou hast enabled me to know Him, the Dawning-Light of Thy grace and the Horizon of Thy favour and the Source of Thy religion. I beseech Thee by Thy Name, by Whom the faces of those who are near unto Thee have been whitened, and the hearts of those who love Thee have flown unto Thee, that Thou mayest suffer me to hold fast to Thy rope in all times and in all circumstances, detached from the bonds of all save Thee, and that mine eyes may be directed towards the horizon of Thy Revelation and be enabled to do that which Thou hast decreed for me in Thy Book.
O my Lord, adorn my soul and my body with the robe of Thy mercy and Thy love. Then deliver me from all that Thou dost not approve, and of Thy grace, suffer me and my household to obey Thee and to turn away from that which may stir up lust and all evil desires within me.
Verily, Thou art the Lord of all mankind, and the Possessor of this world and the hereafter. There is no God beside Thee, the All-knowing, the All-wise.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O Compassionate Lord, all these are Thy servants, waiting here for Thy bounty and blessings. O God, establish them upon the intimations of Thy unique Essence. Manifest and reveal the virtues hidden and invisible in these human beings. O God, we are like plants, Thy bounty is like rain; make these plants grow and flourish through the sustenance of Thy generosity. We are all obedient to Thy command. Deliver us from the chains of this worldly life. We are ignorant; make us wise. We are dead; give us life. We are desirous; fill us with inspiration, we are dependent; make us confidants of Thy mystery. We are needy; enrich us with Thy abundant riches. O Lord, fill us with spirit, give us sight, make us hear. Make us acquainted with the mysteries of life. That through this, the secret of Thy glory may be apprehended by us and we may acknowledge Thy greatness, every bounty originating from Thee, every favor being Thine, Thou art Mighty, Powerful, Bountiful, Most Generous.

Whenever a group of people gather in the place of assembly, engaged in the praise of God, and speak to one another about the mysteries of God, verily the breezes of the Holy Spirit shall blow upon them with peace and each one will receive a portion thereof.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

lo.cat: ບົດອະທິຖານສໍາລັບຄູ່ສົມລົດ

prayers.text:
I will extract the English translation provided in the search results and present it according to your specifications.

O my God! O my God! This, Thy servant, hath advanced towards Thee, is passionately wandering in the desert of Thy love, walking in the path of Thy service, anticipating Thy favors, hoping for Thy bounty, relying upon Thy kingdom, and intoxicated by the wine of Thy gift. O my God! Increase the fervor of his affection for Thee, the constancy of his praise of Thee, and the ardor of his love for Thee. Verily, Thou art the Most Generous, the Lord of grace abounding. There is no other God but Thee, the Forgiving, the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God! O my God!

This is a lamp kindled by the fire of Your love, and shining with the fire kindled on the wood of Your mercy.

O my God!

Increase passion, ardor, with leaves of fire, with fire kindled at Sinai of Your Richness.

Truly, You the Steadfast, the Helper, the Powerful, the Kind, the Loving.
prayers.name: The Growing Spirit (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานให้ผู้ที่ถึงแก่กรรม

prayers.text:
O my God, my God! Thy servant is advancing towards Thee, wandering with heart aflame in the immensity of Thy love, walking in the path of Thy service, hoping for Thy favours, longing for Thy blessings, depending on Thy kingdom, and intoxicated with the sweet savours of Thy gifts. O my God! strengthen his ardour for Thy love, his constancy in praising Thee, and his devotion to Thee.

Verily, Thou art the Most Generous, the Lord of infinite bounty, there is none other God besides Thee, Thou art the Bountiful, the Merciful.
prayers.name: 靈性成長 (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O Lord, my God! Help those whom Thou hast loved to be firm in Thy Faith, to walk in Thy ways, to be steadfast in Thy Cause. Grant them Thy bounty that they may be protected from the assaults of self and desire, that they may follow the light of Thy guidance. Thou art the Mighty, the Everlasting, the Self-Subsisting, the Omniscient, the All-Merciful, the All-Powerful, the All-Possessing.
prayers.name: Steadfastness (LLM translated)

ja.cat: ティーチング（一般の祈り）

prayers.text:
O my Lord, my God, remove Thou my sorrow with Thy bounteous favour, and dispel my grief with Thy sovereignty and Thy might. O my Lord, my God, Thou seest

that I have turned unto Thee when sorrow hath encompassed me on every side;    O Thou, the Lord of all life, and above all names and all things, I implore Thee by Thy name that doth inflame the hearts and souls of men, by the waves of Thy mercy, and the splendours of the sun of Thy favour, count me

amongst them that turn unto Thee, O Thou, the Lord of all names, and the Fashioner of the heavens!

    O my Lord, Thou seest what hath befallen me in Thy days, and I implore Thee by the Dhikr of Thy name and the mysteries of Thy attributes, to ordain for me that which will cause me to arise to serve Thee and to laud Thy praises. Verily, Thou art the All-Bountiful, the Most High, the Hearer of all prayers!

    And lastly, I beseech Thee by the light of Thy countenance, to bless my deeds, to redeem my debts, and to remove my straits. Thou art He by Whom all do affirm Thy power and Thy dominion, and all hearts that know Thee bear witness to Thy sovereignty and Thy sovereignty. There is none other God besides Thee, the Hearer and the Answerer.
prayers.name: When faced with adversity (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Praise be to my God. By Your Name, which no one can comprehend and no one can measure its significance, and by Him Who is the Source of Your Revelation and the Dawn of Your signs, I implore. Make my heart a vessel for Your love and remembrance, and so connect this vessel that from it may flow the living waters of Your wisdom, and the pure, clear streams of Your glory and Your praise, to Your great ocean.
My limbs bear witness to Your oneness, my hair testifies to Your sovereignty and Your dominion. I have utterly abandoned self, and have surrendered to nothingness, and I stand at the gate of Your grace, clinging to the hem of Your bounty, and gaze toward the horizon of Your gifts.
O my God. Ordain for me that which is befitting the greatness of Your majesty. Aid me with Your enhancing grace, that I may teach and spread abroad Your teachings. Grant me the power of dissemination, that the dead may rise from their graves and hasten to Your presence, fully trusting in Thee, and turning their eyes toward the dawning light of Your teachings and the dawning of Your revelation.
Verily, Thou art empowered, most exalted and all-knowing, and wise in all things.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

ja.cat: ティーチング（一般の祈り）

prayers.text:
The search results provide an English translation of the prayer. I will extract the most commonly accepted translation and output it directly, adhering to the user's formatting requirements.

The most common English translation is: "O God, Praised and Holy! O God, Merciful and Kind! Remove us from difficulties by Thy grace and favor. Verily, Thou art Merciful and Kind."
This needs to be outputted directly, without any surrounding text or quotes.O God, Praised and Holy! O God, Merciful and Kind! Remove us from difficulties by Thy grace and favor. Verily, Thou art Merciful and Kind.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God! Let me drink from the fragrant streams of Thy eternity and make me worthy to taste the fruits of the tree of Thy being, O my Hope!
Let me quaff from the crystal-pure springs of Thy love, O my Glory! and grant me rest in the shade of Thy eternal covenant, O my Light!
Make me worthy to repose in the garden of Thy proximity, in Thy presence, O my Beloved! and set me upon the right hand of Thy throne, O my Desire!
Let the waft of Thy joy blow over me, O my Goal! Admit me to the heavens of Thy truth, O my Adored One!
Suffer me to hear the melody of the Voice of Thy unity, O my Effulgent God! Animate me with the spirit of Thy power and Thy might, O my Sustainer!
Make me steadfast in Thy love, O my Helper! and set my feet firm in the path of Thy gladness, O my Creator!
Suffer me to dwell eternally in the garden of Thy immortality, in the presence of Thy countenance, O Thou who art ever merciful unto me! and establish me upon the seat of Thy glory, O Thou who art my Lord!
Let me soar into the heavens of Thy love, O my Life! and illumine my path with the sun of Thy guidance, O my Charmer!
Cause me to apprehend the essence of Thy hidden being, O Thou who art my Origin and my ultimate Desire; and let me return unto the essence of the perfume of Thy beauty, O Thou who art my God!
Thou art able to do that which Thou dost will. Thou art, verily, the Most High, the All-Glorious, the Supreme.
prayers.name: Spiritual Qualities (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Praise be unto Thee, O my God! I am one of Thy servants, who hath believed on Thee and on Thy signs. Thou seest how I have set myself towards the door of Thy mercy, and turned my face in the direction of Thy loving-kindness. I beseech Thee, by Thy most excellent titles and Thy most exalted attributes, to open to my face the portals of Thy bestowals. Aid me, then, to do that which is good, O Thou Who art the Possessor of all names and attributes!
I am poor, O my Lord, and Thou art the Rich. I have set my face towards Thee, and detached myself from all but Thee. Deprive me not, I implore Thee, of the breezes of Thy tender mercy, and withhold not from me what Thou didst ordain for the chosen among Thy servants.
Remove the veil from mine eyes, O my Lord, that I may recognize what Thou hast desired for Thy creatures, and discover, in all the manifestations of Thy handiwork, the revelations of Thine almighty power. Enrapture my soul, O my Lord, with Thy most mighty signs, and draw me out of the depths of my corrupt and evil desires. Write down, then, for me the good of this world and of the world to come. Potent art Thou to do what pleaseth Thee. No God is there but Thee, the All-Glorious, Whose help is sought by all men.
I yield Thee thanks, O my Lord, that Thou hast wakened me from my sleep, and stirred me up, and created in me the desire to perceive what most of Thy servants have failed to apprehend. Make me able, therefore, O my Lord, to behold, for love of Thee and for the sake of Thy pleasure, whatsoever Thou hast desired. Thou art He to the power of Whose might and sovereignty all things testify. There is none other God but Thee, the Almighty, the Beneficent.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Glory be to Thee, O Lord of all worlds, Thou Who art the Hope of all nations, and the Desire of all hearts. Thou Who hast appeared in the Greatest Name, through Whom the pearls of wisdom and utterance have emerged from the shell of Thy knowledge, and the heaven of divine revelation hath been adorned with the lights of the appearance of the Sun of Thy countenance.
　We entreat Thee by Thy Word which hath completed the proofs of Thy creatures and fulfilled the testimonies unto Thy servants. Make Thy people strong, that the face of Thy teachings may shine upon Thy dominion, and the banners of Thy power be raised among Thy servants, and the ensigns of guidance be planted throughout Thy land.
　O my Lord! Behold those who have clung to the cords of Thy grace and grasped the hem of the cloak of Thy bounty. Ordain for them that which will draw them unto Thee, and separate them from all things besides Thee.
　We entreat Thee, Who art the King of existence and the Protector of all that is seen and unseen. Make all who arise to serve Thy Cause to be as the seas moving at Thy will, and as the fires consuming Thy sacred Tree, and as the stars shining from the celestial horizon of Thy good-pleasure. Verily Thou art the All-Powerful, Who canst weaken the power of all the world and the strength of all mankind. There is none other God beside Thee, Thou art the One, the Protector, the Self-Subsistent.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

ja.cat: ティーチング（一般の祈り）

prayers.text:
The translation is as follows:

O my God, Thou knowest that tribulations are encompassing me from every direction. Thou art also well aware that none except Thee can remove or change them. I place my confidence in my love for Thee. Thou dost not bring afflictions upon any soul except when Thou wishest to exalt his station in Thy celestial paradise, or to sustain his heart with the impregnable stronghold of Thy power in this earthly life, that thereby the inclination to the vanities of this world may be cut off. I shall ever regard the remembrance of Thee as infinitely preferable to possessing all that is in heaven and on earth, and all that is therein. For Thou, indeed, knowest this.

　O my God, strengthen my heart in Thy obedience and in Thy love. Grant that I may be detached from all that pertaineth unto Thy enemies. Verily, I swear by Thy glory, I have no desire but Thee, and no hope except in Thee, and no fear save that which ariseth from the remembrance of Thee. My supplication unto Thee is that Thou mayest forgive me and all who love Thee, and mayest graciously vouchsafe unto us that which Thou hast ordained for them that are devoted unto Thee. For Thou art indeed All-knowing, the Gracious, the Bountiful.

　O Lord of Heaven and Earth! Thou art exalted far above the praise of all Thy creatures. Let peace be upon Thy faithful servants. And glory be unto God, the Lord of all worlds.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

ja.cat: ティーチング（一般の祈り）

prayers.text: God, my God! Thou beholdest this weak one begging for celestial strength, this poor one craving Thy heavenly treasures, this thirsty one longing for the fountain of eternal life, this afflicted one yearning for Thy promised healing through Thy boundless mercy which Thou hast destined for Thy chosen servants in Thy kingdom on high. O Lord! I have no helper save Thee, no shelter besides Thee, and no sustainer except Thee. Assist me with Thine angels to diffuse Thy holy fragrances and to spread abroad Thy teachings amongst the choicest of Thy people. O my Lord! Suffer me to be detached from aught else save Thee, to hold fast to the hem of Thy bounty, to be wholly devoted to Thy Faith, to remain fast and firm in Thy love and to observe what Thou hast prescribed in Thy Book. Verily, Thou art the Powerful, the Mighty, the Omnipotent.
prayers.name: To the Bahá'ís in Canada and Greenland (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
I have found the English translation of the prayer you provided.

## Repentance

O my God! O my God! I have turned repentant towards Thee, and verily Thou art the Forgiver, the Compassionate.

O my God! O my God! I have returned unto Thee, and verily Thou art He Who always forgives, the Bountiful.

O my God! O my God! I have clung to the cord of Thy munificence, and with Thee is all that is in the heaven and the earth.

O my God! O my God! I have hastened unto Thee, and verily Thou art the Forgiver, the Lord of abundant grace.

O my God! O my God! I am thirsty for the celestial wine of Thy grace, and verily Thou art the Giver, the Munificent, the Bountiful, the Almighty.

O my God! O my God! I bear witness that Thou hast revealed Thy Cause, hast fulfilled Thy promise, and hast sent down from the heaven of Thy grace that which hath attracted the hearts of Thy favoured ones unto Thee. Blessed is he who hath clung to Thy firm cord and hath held fast to the hem of Thy luminous mantle!

I beseech Thee, O Lord of all beings and King of the visible and invisible, by Thy power, Thy majesty, and Thy sovereignty, to permit that my name be inscribed by Thy pen of glory among Thy devoted ones, such as have not been prevented by the writings of sinners from turning towards the light of Thy countenance, O God, Who hearest and answerest prayers.
## Repentance

O my God! O my God! I have turned repentant towards Thee, and verily Thou art the Forgiver, the Compassionate.

O my God! O my God! I have returned unto Thee, and verily Thou art He Who always forgives, the Bountiful.

O my God! O my God! I have clung to the cord of Thy munificence, and with Thee is all that is in the heaven and the earth.

O my God! O my God! I have hastened unto Thee, and verily Thou art the Forgiver, the Lord of abundant grace.

O my God! O my God! I am thirsty for the celestial wine of Thy grace, and verily Thou art the Giver, the Munificent, the Bountiful, the Almighty.

O my God! O my God! I bear witness that Thou hast revealed Thy Cause, hast fulfilled Thy promise, and hast sent down from the heaven of Thy grace that which hath attracted the hearts of Thy favoured ones unto Thee.

Blessed is he who hath clung to Thy firm cord and hath held fast to the hem of Thy luminous mantle!

I beseech Thee, O Lord of all beings and King of the visible and invisible, by Thy power, Thy majesty, and Thy sovereignty, to permit that my name be inscribed by Thy pen of glory among Thy devoted ones, such as have not been prevented by the writings of sinners from turning towards the light of Thy countenance, O God, Who hearest and answerest prayers.
prayers.name: Constancia (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
I have translated the prayer.

Praised be Thou, O Lord my God! Thou art He the excellence of Whose glory hath exalted them who are the sources of authority and honor, the potency of Whose might hath empowered them who are the fountainheads of energy and strength, the dominion of Whose will hath elevated the Exponents of Thy Cause above all that are in heaven and on earth, and the life-giving effusions of Whose Pen have quickened the souls of the denizens of the kingdom of creation.
I am he, O my Lord, who hath turned his face towards Thee, wholly for the love of Thee, and, recognizing Thy power and Thy sovereignty, hath directed his steps towards Thy well-beloved Sanctuary, Thy hallowed and holy Court. In this state, I have reached the City wherein, in the full glory of Thy names, Thou hast revealed Thyself unto all created things. Therein, I have communed with Thy well-beloved ones, and, from the House within its walls, have inhaled the breaths of Thy holiness and perceived the fragrances of Thy fellowship.
Cast me not out from Thy presence, O my Lord, nor expel me from the precinct of Thy love and Thy pleasure. For the poor one shall find no refuge unless he resorteth to the portal of Thy wealth, and the exile shall attain no peace unless he be admitted into the court of Thy favor.
Magnified be Thy name, O my Lord, for Thou hast enabled me to recognize the Manifestation of Thine own Self, and hast caused me to be assured of the truth of the verses which have descended upon Thee. Empower me, I implore Thee, to cling steadfastly unto whatsoever Thou hast bidden me observe. Help me to guard the pearls of Thy love which, by Thy decree, Thou hast enshrined within my heart. Send down, moreover, every moment of my life, O my God, that which will preserve me from any one but Thee, and will set my feet firm in Thy Cause.
Thou art, in truth, the God of glory, the God of power, the God of knowledge and of wisdom. No God is there but Thee, the Great Giver, the Most Generous, the Almighty, the Ever-Forgiving.
Praised be God, the All-Glorious, the All-Compelling.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Praise be to Thee, O my God! I implore Thee by Thy Name, which hath caused the oceans of Thy goodness and mercy to surge within every drop, and the luminaries of Thy bountiful blessings and graces to shine from every atom, that Thou mayest adorn every soul with the raiment of Thy love, so that within Thy land there may remain none except such as have turned towards Thee, or have detached themselves from all save Thee.
Thou, in truth, O my God, hast suffered the Manifestation of Thyself to be afflicted with every manner of adversity, that Thy servants might ascend unto the Lote-tree of Thy appreciative favours, and attain unto that which Thou, through Thy kindness and merciful providence, didst ordain for them in the Epistles of Thy irrevocable decree. The glory of Thy might beareth me witness! Were they to offer themselves as a sacrifice in Thy path throughout the entirety of their lives, they would still have done but little in comparison with the manifold favours Thou hast graciously bestowed upon them.
Suffer, therefore, I beseech Thee, their hearts to incline towards Thee, and their faces to turn towards that which Thou choosest. Thou art powerful to do what Thou desirest. There is none other God beside Thee, the Unapproachable, the All-Glorious, the Eternal Merciful.
Vouchsafe, then, O my God, to accept from Thy servant that which he hath shown of his love for Thee. Strengthen him, then, that he may cling unto Thy most sublime Word, laud Thy praises with fluency, and associate himself with them of Thy people who are nigh unto Thee. Thou art He in Whose hands is the empire of all things. There is none other God beside Thee, the Almighty, the Helper in the Self-Same Peril, the All-Glorious, the Absolute.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเมื่อประสบความยากลำบาก

prayers.text:
Praise be Thou, O my Lord, my God! I implore Thee - by Thy signs that have encompassed all creation, by the light of Thy countenance, which hath shone upon all in the heavens and on the earth, by Thy mercy that hath surpassed all created things, and Thy grace that hath diffused itself over all the universe - rend the veils that have shut me out from Thee, that I may hasten to the fount of Thy powerful inspiration and the dawning-light of Thy Revelation and Thy bounteous gifts, and may immerse myself in the ocean of Thy favour and Thy proximity.
Suffer me not to be prevented from knowing Thee in Thy days, O my Lord, nor deprive me of the raiment of Thy guidance. Let me drink from the river of life everlasting, whose waters have streamed forth from the Paradise wherein the throne of Thy Name, the Most Merciful, is established, that mine eyes may be opened, and my face illuminated, and my heart be reassured, and my soul be quickened, and my steps become firm.
Thou art He Who, from all eternity, hath, by the power of His might, been supreme over all things, and, by the operation of His will, hath been able to order all whatsoever Thou wishest. Nothing, indeed, whether in Thy heaven or on Thy earth, can frustrate Thy purpose. Have compassion on me, therefore, O my Lord, through Thy loving-kindness and Thy bounty, and incline mine ears to the sweet melodies of the birds that warble their praises to Thee, amidst the branches of the tree of Thy unity.
Thou art the Great Bestower of Gifts, the Ever-Forgiving, the Most Compassionate.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

eo.cat: Sindono, Persisto kaj Disvastigo de la diaj instruoj

prayers.text:
O Lord, may Thy praise be sung for the manifestation of Thy love for all humanity! O God, Thou art our joyous Song! O God, Thou art our life and light. Guide Thy servants unto Thy loving path and make them prosperous. Deliver us from all bonds save Thyself.

O God, teach us Thy oneness and let us glimpse Thy unity, so that we may see naught else but Thee. Thou art the Gracious, the Bountiful!

O Lord, kindle in the hearts of Thy lovers the flames of love, so that all else save Thee may be consumed in them.

O Lord, grant us to realize Thy boundless eternity. Thou hast ever been and wilt ever be. Make us to perceive that there is no other God but Thee. Verily, from Thee alone we shall receive our strength and power.
prayers.name: Unity (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเพื่อการอภัย

prayers.text:
I bear witness, O my God, that Thou hast created me to know Thee and to worship Thee. I testify, at this moment, to my powerlessness and to Thy might, to my poverty and to Thy wealth. There is none other God but Thee, the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.

*(Bahá’u’lláh stated, when the three prayer hours were chosen, one of the prayer hours was selected from the twenty-four hours of the day, a great honor for the prayer that is very short in the three prayer hours, whether the prayers are answered once a day or during the twenty-four hours of the day.)*
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
O my God, Guide of those who seek the path leading to the right way; Deliverer of stray, sightless souls from the dregs of hell; Bestower of great boons and favors upon the truthful; Protector of those who fear within Thy invincible sanctuary; Thou art He who answers the call of those who raise their voice unto Thee from beyond Thy most lofty horizon.

O my Lord, mayest Thou be praised! Thou hast guided the heedless from the death of despair, and brought unto Thee those who have drawn nigh, to the goal of their journey; Thou hast made Thy steadfast servants to rejoice by fulfilling their cherished desires; from Thy kingdom of beauty, before the faces of them that yearn for Thee, Thou hast opened the doors of reunion, and delivered them from the evil of loss and perdition—so that they have hastened unto Thee, attained Thy presence, come unto Thy welcoming gate, and received abundant gifts.

O my Lord, they were thirsty; Thou hast given unto their dry lips the water of reunion. O Thou Bounteous, O Thou Bestower, with the balm of Thy grace and Thy favour, Thou hast assuaged their pain; with the supreme medicine of Thy mercy, Thou hast healed their maladies. O Lord, make firm their feet in Thy path of guidance; widen for them the eye of the needle; clothe them with royal robes, and cause them to walk forever in the glory they have attained.

Verily, Thou art the Generous, the Ever-Bestowing, the Munificent, the Most Liberal. There is none other God than Thee, the Almighty, the All-Powerful, the Exalted, the Victorious.
prayers.name: Devotion (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Naw-Rúz - "O Pen of Glory, say: We have enjoined upon you fasting for a fixed number of days (nineteen), and when this is ended, We have designated Naw-Rúz (the first day of the New Year) as a festival for you." - Kitáb-i-Aqdas.

Thou art greatly praised, O my Lord, since Thou hast ordained Naw-Rúz as a festival for those who have observed the Fast for love of Thee and abstained from that which is abhorrent in Thy sight. Ordain this, O my Supreme Lord, so that the fire of Thy love and the warmth generated by the Fast enjoined by Thee may inspire them in Thy Faith and engage them in Thy praise and remembrance.

Since Thou hast adorned them, O my Supreme Lord, with the adornment of the Fast as directed by Thee, therefore, do Thou also adorn them with the adornment of Thy approval through Thy compassion and gracious bounty. For the deeds of men are wholly dependent on Thy pleasure and subject to Thy command. Him who breaketh the Fast, Thou wilt regard as him who hath observed the Fast, and count him among those who have observed the Fast from eternity. Whosoever hath observed the Fast and afterwards hath broken it, thy command shall be thus: that such a person be reckoned among them who have defiled the raiment of Thy revealed Word with dust and have been removed far from the pure waters of this living, heavenly fountain.

Thou art He through Whom the banner of 'Praise be to Thee in Thy works' hath been raised, and the standard of 'Thy command is fulfilled' hath been unfurled. Make known this Thy station, O my Lord, unto Thy servants, that they may be aware that the excellence of all things dependeth on Thy command and Thy Word, and the virtue of every deed on the pleasure of Thy good-pleasure and Thy will, and that they may know that the reins of men's actions are within the grasp of Thy approval and command. Make them aware that this day
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานเมื่อประสบความยากลำบาก

prayers.text:
O Thou Whose nearness is my hope, Whose presence is my aspiration, Whose remembrance is my yearning, Whose beauty is my aim, Whose light is my desire, Whose love is my companion, Whose service is my highest ambition! I implore Thee by Thy Name that hath enabled such as love Thee to ascend unto the heights of Thy knowledge, and hath strengthened them that worship Thee with faith to enter the courts of Thy pure bounty. Aid me, O my God, to turn my face towards Thee, fix my gaze upon Thee, and utter Thy praise.

O my Lord, I am he who hath forgotten all save Thee, and turned his face towards the horizon of Thy grace, and cast away all else save Thee, in hope of drawing nigh unto Thy court. Let mine eyes, O my beloved, gaze upon the luminous sanctuary of Thy countenance. Grant, O my Lord, that which shall make me steadfast in Thy religion, so that the doubts of the infidels may not keep me back from Thee.

Verily, Thou art the Lord of might, the succorer in peril, the Glorious, the Bountiful.
prayers.name: Prayer for steadfastness in religion (LLM translated)

lo.cat: ບົດອະທິຖານໃຫ້ຈິດໃຈໝັ້ນຄົງໃນສາສະໜາ

th.cat: บทอธิษฐานให้จิตใจมั่นคงในศาสนา

prayers.text:
O my God, my Lord, the Goal of my desire! This servant of Thine, yearns to slumber in the shadow of Thy mercy and rest beneath the veil of Thy compassion, supplicating for Thy watchfulness and Thy protection.

I beseech Thee, O my Lord, with Thine eye that slumbereth not, to guard mine eyes that they may not behold aught besides Thee. Strengthen, then, its sight that it may perceive Thy signs, and gaze upon the Horizon of Thy revelation. Thou art He before Whose face the fever of power hath trembled.

There is no God but Thee, the Almighty, the Utterly Submissive, the Uncompelled.
prayers.name: EVENING (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
He is the All-Glorious!
O Mary! When Jesus, the Spirit, ascended from the placeless realm, the cage of being became empty of the praised bird, and the Nightingale of Eternity turned towards the wilderness of non-existence. The Divine Nightingale cried out upon the Tree of Lordship, tearing apart the pavilion of glory, and the Phoenix of Exaltation flew away from the bough of delight. The lofty heavens settled upon the dark earth, and lamentations arose from aching hearts. Sweet water turned to blood, and the expanse of the Supreme Paradise was mingled with blood. Verily, the luminous breasts of the friends are worthy of the arrow of divine decree, and the necks of ardent lovers are fit for the noose of infinite tribulation. Wherever there is a dart, it strikes the heart of the beloved; and wherever there is sorrow, it descends upon the souls of the companions. Lovers must have tearful eyes, and beloved ones may show grace and coquetry. If the Beloved utters a hundred laments, the Object of Love will only increase in cruelty. If you seek the draught of reunion, surrender your body to annihilation; and if you crave the wine of beauty, step into the valley of deprivation.

O Mary! Exchange grief for joy, and draw joy from the cup of sorrow. If you wish to tread the path of quest, be patient, do not scratch your face, do not shed tears from your eyes, and be not among the impatient. Wear the garment of submission, drink from the wine of contentment, and sell the whole world for a mere coin. Bind your heart to the divine decree and link it to the command of destiny. Open the eye of insight, and turn away from all save the Friend, for soon we shall encircle the sacred Presence, turn towards the Holy Court, hear the melody of Hijaz from the lute of Iraq, and join the Friend. We shall speak the unspoken, see the unseen, hear the unheard, and to the rhythm of light, we shall make the temple of the spirit dance. In the sanctuary of the soul, we shall arrange a delightful feast, and from the Cup-bearer of Majesty, we shall receive the goblet of Beauty. In remembrance of the Face of the All-Glorious, we shall drink the peerless wine. Cleanse the eye of water, sweep the heart of sorrow, free the soul from grief, and sing in a sweet melody:

# If swords rain down in the street of that Moon,
# We have bowed our necks; the decree is God's.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Anyone who rises to go on a Teaching Journey to any Place, let them recite this Prayer Day and Night while traveling through Unknown Lands:
O God, my God! Thou seest me enamored and attracted to Thy glorious kingdom, ablaze with the fire of Thy love among humanity, a herald of Thy kingdom in these vast and spacious countries, detached from all save Thee, trusting in Thee, having abandoned rest and comfort. Thou seest me far from my native land traversing these regions, a stranger prostrate and humble before Thy exalted threshold, submissive before the heaven of Thy omnipotent glory, beseeching Thee in the dead of night and at twilight, invoking Thee and asking, in the morning and in the evening, that Thou mayest graciously help me to serve Thy Cause, to spread Thy teachings, and to extol Thy Word in the East and the West.
O Lord! Strengthen me and empower me to serve Thee with utmost effort and forsake me not in my solitude and helplessness in these regions.
O Lord! Grant me communion with Thee in my loneliness and be my companion in these strange lands.
Verily, Thou art the Sustainer of whomsoever Thou choosest in whatsoever Thou wishest, and verily, Thou art the Almighty, the All-Powerful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text: O my God, by Thy power, Thy might, and Thy sovereignty which gather all those who are on earth and in heaven, I implore Thee to make known to Thy servants this luminous way and this straight path. May they recognize Thy unity and Thy uniqueness with such certainty that it is not shaken by the vain ideas of skeptics nor obscured by the futile imaginations of the obstinate! O my Lord, illuminate the eyes of Thy servants and enlighten their hearts by the splendors of the light of Thy knowledge. May they thus understand the greatness of this sublime rank and recognize this luminous horizon so that the clamor of men may not divert their gaze from the resplendent light of Thy unity, nor their faces from the horizon of detachment!
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Ere Zij U, o Heer mijn God! Ik smeek U bij Uw Naam die niemand naar behoren heeft erkend, en welks betekenis geen ziel heeft doorgrond; ik smeek U bij Hem Die de Bron is van Uw Openbaring en de Dageraad van Uw tekenen, mijn hart tot een bewaarplaats van Uw liefde en van het U gedenken te maken. Verbind het dan met Uw grootste Oceaan, dat de levende wateren van Uw wijsheid en de kristalheldere stromen van Uw verheerlijking en lof eruit voort mogen vloeien.
Mijn ledematen getuigen van Uw eenheid, en de haren op mijn hoofd bevestigen de kracht van Uw soevereiniteit en macht. Ik sta aan de deur van Uw genade in volkomen deemoed en volledige zelfverloochening, klem mij aan de zoom van Uw milddadigheid, en richt mijn ogen op de horizon van Uw gaven.
Bestemt Gij toch voor mij, o mijn God, hetgeen de grootheid van Uw majesteit past, en help mij door Uw sterkende genade Uw Zaak zo te onderrichten dat de doden zich uit hun graven spoeden en zich naar U haasten in volledig vertrouwen op U, met hun blik gericht op het morgenland van Uw Zaak en dageraadsplaats van Uw Openbaring.
Gij zijt waarlijk de Krachtigste, de Hoogste, de Alwetende, de Alwijze.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
The translated prayer is:
My investigation into the translation task was interrupted. Here is the translated text:

O God! O God! Thou seest my weakness, my humility, and my obedience before Thy creatures, yet I have put my trust in Thee. Relying on Thy might and power, I have arisen to spread Thy teachings among Thy mighty servants.

O Lord! I am a bird with a broken wing, and I wish to soar in Thy infinite space. How can I do this without Thy favor and grace, without Thy confirmation and help.

O Lord! Have pity on my weakness, and strengthen me with Thy power. O Lord! Have mercy on my helplessness, and aid me with Thy might and majesty.

O Lord! If the breath of the Holy Spirit help the weakest creature, it shall attain all that it hath desired and obtain all that it hath wished. Verily, Thou hast aided Thy servants in the past; though they were the weakest of Thy creatures, the poorest of Thy servants, and the most insignificant of all who have ever lived on earth, yet through Thy leave and by Thy power they have surpassed the noblest of Thy people and the most excellent of mankind. Though they were moths in former times, they became by Thy gift and Thy mercy the phoenix of kings; though they were small streams, they became seas. By Thy greatest favour, they became stars shining from the horizon of guidance, birds singing in the eternal garden, lions roaring in the forests of knowledge and wisdom, and fishes swimming in the ocean of life.

Verily, Thou art the Compassionate, the Powerful, the Glorious, and the Merciful of the Merciful.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)

prayers.text:
Believers and promulgators should recite this prayer daily.
O Merciful Lord! Praise be to Thee. Thou hast shown us the path of guidance, opened the gates of the Kingdom, and revealed Thyself through the Sun of Reality. Thou givest sight to the blind, hearing to the deaf, life to the dead, riches to the poor, and direction to the lost. Thou leadest the thirsty to the fount of guidance, causest the fish in the parched ruts to reach the ocean of Reality, and invitest the wandering birds to the rose garden of grace.
O Almighty Lord! We are Thy servants, and Thy poor. Though we are far from Thee, we long for Thy advent. We thirst for Thy living waters, we are sick and afflicted, and seek Thy healing. We walk in Thy path, with no desire save to spread Thy fragrance. May all cry aloud: "O God! Guide us to the right path!" May their eyes be opened to see the light, may they be freed from the darkness of ignorance, may they gather round the lamp of Thy guidance. May the dispossessed know Thy mysteries, may the unblessed receive Thy favour.
O Almighty Lord! Look upon us with Thy loving gaze, and grant us heavenly confirmation. Breathe upon us with the Spirit of Life, and help us in serving Thy Cause. By the light of Thy guidance, may we illuminate these regions like shining stars.
Verily, Thou art the Powerful, the Mighty, the All-Wise, the All-Seer.
prayers.name: (LLM translated)
